name: hxdiscord_api
description: A modern, interactions-first Discord API wrapper for Haxe (NodeJS, Discord API v10).
releasenote: Initial release. Bot-token gateway + REST for Discord API v10: connect/heartbeat/identify/dispatch, intents, typed models, and a unified command system (prefix commands with global or per-command prefixes, condition rules, and slash commands with ephemeral replies), plus embeds. Targets Node.js and C++ (hxcpp).
